positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a crescent moon embracing a cluster of glowing neon-toned celestial elements: three stylized comets, a zodiac constellation map, and blooming bioluminescent flora. The style is high-contrast linocut woodblock print meets modern vector graphic art, rendered in deep midnight blues, cosmic violets, and electric cyan accents. Focus on clean, sharp silhouettes with minimal gradient transitions for optimal textile printing. The composition should be centered and balanced, utilizing negative space effectively for a mystical, ethereal feeling. Detailed cross-hatching and bold outlines are preferred. Perfect for apparel placement.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, jpeg artifacts
